SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway.ads

Class DEXStorageSender

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads.RestfulFileSender
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads.DEXStorageSender
All Implemented Interfaces:
FileSender
@Component public class DEXStorageSender extends RestfulFileSender implements FileSender
This class implements the FileSender interface to Azure and the Azurite Azure emulator.

    • getConnection

      public HttpURLConnection getConnection(String type, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IDestination route, Metadata meta, jakarta.activation.DataHandler data) throws IOException, gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.DestinationConnectionFault, MetadataFault, gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault
      Description copied from class: RestfulFileSender
      Connect the socket to the phiz_trust_ws_client trust store for endpoint certificate validation. and set up of other parameters (e.g., encryption, TLS version, et cetera).

      getConnection in class RestfulFileSender
      Parameters:
      type -
      route - The URL to Connect
      meta -
      data -
      Returns:
      The connection
      Throws:
      IOException - If any errors occur setting up the connection
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.DestinationConnectionFault
      MetadataFault - If there are issues in the metadata configuration.
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault
